title: [Python] Update InstanceBuilder to populate input/output names for hw.InstanceOp
body:
After https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/3d19aa785468d4819961acf296c015d6f7fb318f, `HWInstanceOp` (in C++) has two new attributes to store arrays of input/output port names. Since this changed in ODS, the generated `hw.InstanceOp` (in Python) has two new arguments to the constructor. We need to update this to pass them in accordingly as `post_args`:

https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/8b08c41e6cc5b6765b34ba1d037667881d69191a/lib/Bindings/Python/circt/dialects/_hw_ops_ext.py#L34

This manifests as errors in the Python bindings tests that look like this:

```
TypeError: __init__() missing 2 required positional arguments: 'parameters' and 'sym_name'
```
